winning_roll_value: {exact_finish_rule_text} Count from the {query_color} token along that lane. What die roll lands it on finish?
{exact_finish_rule_text} Along the {query_color} home lane, which die roll moves the token exactly to finish?
{exact_finish_rule_text} How many spaces remain for the {query_color} token to reach finish?
{exact_finish_rule_text} Count the spaces from the {query_color} token to the final {query_color} home-lane cell. What die roll is needed?
{exact_finish_rule_text} What exact die roll moves the {query_color} token to its finish cell?
capture_roll_option_label: {capture_option_rule_text} Which roll option lets the {query_color} token land on the {target_color} token?
{capture_option_rule_text} Select the option that moves the {query_color} token onto the {target_color} token.
{capture_option_rule_text} Which displayed roll option captures the {target_color} token with the {query_color} token?
{capture_option_rule_text} Which option label lands the {query_color} token on the {target_color} token?
{capture_option_rule_text} Which option reaches the {target_color} token from the {query_color} token?
move_result_option_label: {move_sequence_rule_text} Which board letter marks where the {query_color} token ends?
{move_sequence_rule_text} Move the {query_color} token by that sequence. Which destination letter does it reach?
{move_sequence_rule_text} Which board letter is reached by the {query_color} token?
{move_sequence_rule_text} Which labeled destination cell is the final position for the {query_color} token?
{move_sequence_rule_text} After applying the shown sequence to the {query_color} token, which board letter is reached?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a Ludo-style cross board with one visible token for each player color, colored home lanes leading toward the center, and arrows showing movement direction
code_prompt_defaults.exact_finish_rule_text: Finish is the final colored cell at the end of a token's home lane near the center. Count spaces only along that same colored home lane; the token must land exactly on finish.
code_prompt_defaults.capture_option_rule_text: Move clockwise along the track. A "6 then k" option means move 6 spaces, then k more spaces.
code_prompt_defaults.move_sequence_rule_text: Use the dice sequence shown below the board and move clockwise along the track.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_winning_roll_value: set "annotation" to one pixel point [x,y] at the token center
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_winning_roll_value: set "answer" to the integer die roll equal to the remaining spaces
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_capture_roll_option_labe: set "annotation" to an object with keys "mover_token" and "target_token", each mapped to a point as [x,y] in pixels
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_capture_roll_option_label: set "answer" to the selected shown option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_move_result_option_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "moving_token" and "destination_cell", each mapped to a point as [x,y] in pixels
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_move_result_option_label: set "answer" to the selected shown destination label
